label: E-commerce
description: Transform galleries into powerful sales tools. Showcase products and enable direct purchases for a complete shopping experience.

settings.title: WooCommerce Integration
settings.description: Full WooCommerce sync - automatically update galleries when products change. Dynamic product galleries that stay current.

settings.title: Direct Add to Cart
settings.description: Add 'Add to Cart' and 'View Product' buttons directly to gallery items. Turn viewers into buyers instantly.

settings.title: Product Variations
settings.description: Display and purchase product variations (colors, sizes, options) directly from the lightbox. Complete shopping experience.

settings.title: Sale Badges & Pricing
settings.description: Eye-catching sale badges, discount ribbons, and dynamic pricing display. Show prices, stock status, and compare-at prices.

settings.title: Product Category Filtering
settings.description: Organize and filter gallery items by WooCommerce product categories. Create category-specific product showcases.

settings.title: Seamless Checkout Flow
settings.description: Complete checkout integration - items added from galleries maintain all product data, variations, and pricing in cart and orders.
